title: Rubio Walks Back Suggestion That Israel Forced U.S. Hand in Iran Strikes
author: Robert Jimison
fullText: A day earlier, the secretary of state had said that the decision to attack Iran was based on knowledge that Israel was going to strike, and an assumption that Iran would target U.S. forces as a result.
summary: A day earlier, the secretary of state had said that the decision to attack Iran was based on knowledge that Israel was going to strike, and an assumption that Iran would target U.S. forces as a result.
